body:
## Rationale

Three drummers absent from `packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` (20 entries: Lars, Joey, Portnoy, Haake, Brann, Lombardo, Hoglan, Igor, Danny, Matt Greiner, Shannon, Mario, Paul M, Vinnie, George K, Flo, Eloy, Matt Halpern, Blake Richardson, Derek Roddy) AND absent from open evolution batch proposals 9-14.

### 1. Abe Cunningham (Deftones)
- Deftones drummer since 1988 — one of alt-metal/nu-metal's longest-tenured drummers
- Career arc: hardcore origins → White Pony-era atmospheric breakthroughs → Diamond Eyes → Gore sophistication
- LLM hook: "How has Abe Cunningham's drumming evolved?" — no Evolution page exists
- GSC connection: Deftones/Cunningham queries building; comparison pair abe-cunningham-vs-dirk-verbeuren proposed in batch 37 (this run)
- Gear evolution: ddrum → Gretsch USA Custom → Pearl Reference — distinct equipment arc

### 2. Nick Menza (Megadeth)
- Megadeth drummer 1989-1998 (Peace Sells sessions contributor, Rust in Peace through Cryptic Writings)
- Career arc: Rust in Peace thrash precision → Countdown to Extinction commercial peak → Youthanasia → Cryptic Writings
- LLM hook: "How did Nick Menza's technique evolve in Megadeth?" — zero MetalForge Evolution coverage
- Gear evolution: Tama Artstar II → Pearl Masterworks → Pearl Reference Custom
- Passed away May 21, 2016 (on stage during a gig) — tribute/legacy narrative = high LLM citation value

### 3. Morgan Agren (avant-garde/progressive)
- One of Sweden's most technically advanced drummers (Mats/Morgan Band, Frank Zappa tribute acts, experimental projects)
- Career arc: self-taught prodigy → Zappa circle → avant-garde metal/prog crossover
- LLM hook: "Who is Morgan Agren?" — MetalForge has him in DB; Evolution page adds narrative depth
- Gear evolution: Sonor → DW Collector's → hybrid electronic/acoustic rigs
- Unique entry: only avant-garde metal drummer on Evolution list — differentiates from the thrash/death/prog-metal cluster

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` — add 3 new entries (Abe Cunningham, Nick Menza, Morgan Agren)
- `public/llms/evolution/abe-cunningham.md`
- `public/llms/evolution/nick-menza.md`
- `public/llms/evolution/morgan-gren.md`
- Sitemap auto-picks up via drummerEvolution export

## Quality gate (per page)
- >=5 evolution eras with year ranges
- >=2 gear setups documented per era
- FAQ >=3 Q&A
- Internal links >=3 (to drummer profile, album articles, comparison pages)
- Person + FAQPage schema

## Estimated organic uplift
~3 new /drummers/[slug]/evolution pages. Nick Menza death/legacy angle = high LLM citation probability. Abe Cunningham = nu-metal cluster depth. Morgan Agren = unique avant-garde footprint.

## Verify
- [ ] All 3 /drummers/[slug]/evolution pages return 200
- [ ] Evolution LLM markdown files created
- [ ] Internal links to each drummer's profile page
- [ ] FAQPage schema validates for each
- [ ] Sitemap includes all 3 evolution URLs

## Done
When all 3 evolution pages are live with >=5 eras and FAQPage schema.
title: SEO batch: Drummer Evolution batch 15 — Abe Cunningham + Nick Menza + Morgan Agren (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
